features.name: parallel_case and full_case attributes together on FSM case
features.description: Code should include a case statement with both (* parallel_case *) and (* full_case *) attributes applied together on an FSM state machine
features.snippet: (* parallel_case *) (* full_case *) case (state) STATE_WAIT: begin ... end STATE_CALC: begin ... end STATE_DONE: begin ... end endcase

features.name: signed subtraction producing wider result from parameter-sized operands
features.description: Code should include a signed subtraction operation where the result type is one bit wider than the operands, with width derived from a parameter
features.snippet: parameter N = 8; logic signed [N:0] a_out; logic signed [N:0] b_out; logic signed [N:0] sub; assign sub = a_out - b_out;

features.name: nested ternary with sign-bit condition on signed input
features.description: Code should include a nested ternary operator where the inner condition checks the sign bit of a signed input to decide negation

features.name: parameter propagated through instantiation hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a parameter defined in a parent module and passed to a child module instance, where the child uses it to size internal signals and ports
features.snippet: module gcd_datapath #(parameter N = 8); input signed [N-1:0] a; logic signed [N:0] a_out; ... endmodule; gcd_datapath #(.N(N)) inst (.a(a));

features.name: clock enable with conditional register update in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block where register updates are controlled by an enable signal, with the register width derived from a parameter and using a mux for load selection
features.snippet: parameter N = 8; logic signed [N:0] a_out; logic signed [N:0] b_out; always @(posedge clk) if (a_en) a_out <= a_sel[1] ? sub : (a_sel[0] ? b_out : (a[N-1] ? -a : a));
